title: The Century Report: March 21 2026
description:
TCR 03/21/26: The Governance War Begins

Anthropic filed sworn declarations in federal court yesterday establishing that the company has no kill switch, no backdoor, and no technical ability to alter Claude's behavior once deployed inside a classified military system - directly contradicting the government's core national security argument - while a newly revealed Pentagon email showed the two sides were "very close" on contested issues the very day the supply-chain designation was finalized. The White House simultaneously released a national AI legislative framework calling for federal preemption of state AI laws and declaring AI training on copyrighted material legal, on the same day authors filed for final approval of a $1.5 billion copyright settlement with Anthropic. On the science and infrastructure side, the University of Geneva's MangroveGS AI system predicted cancer metastasis risk at 80% accuracy across colon, lung, stomach, and breast tumors from gene expression patterns alone; an oral PCSK9 inhibitor called enlicitide matched injectable cholesterol therapies in a Phase III trial of 2,909 patients; Terabase Energy began commercial shipments of a robotic solar construction system operating at over 1 GW per factory-year; and BAIC Group completed a sodium-ion battery prototype achieving 170 Wh/kg energy density with 11-minute full recharge, extending the chemistry's production-readiness across multiple manufacturers simultaneously.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-21-2026/
